instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor torque converter slip during lock-up operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect slip when the difference between Engine_Speed and Turbine_Speed exceeds Slip_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF ABS(Engine_Speed - Turbine_Speed) > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Slip_Status = Excessive
IF ABS(Engine_Speed - Turbine_Speed) <= Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Slip_Status = Normal
IF TCC_Slip_Status = Excessive THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Turbine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall generate a fault when excessive torque converter slip persists.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger a diagnostic code when slip exceeds Slip_Limit for a calibrated duration.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit FOR Slip_Time_Limit THEN Trigger_TCC_Fault
IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage torque converter clutch when slip exceeds safety limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall release the torque converter clutch when TCC_Slip exceeds Critical_Slip.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor slip during cruising conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall calculate slip during steady cruising speeds.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect abnormal torque converter behavior.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall flag abnormal operation when slip exceeds abnormal thresholds.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slip during lock-up engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall compare engine speed and turbine speed after lock-up engagement.

L4_requirements: IF ABS(Engine_Speed - Turbine_Speed) > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF ABS(Engine_Speed - Turbine_Speed) <= Slip_Limit THEN Maintain_TCC_Engagement
IF Turbine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable lock-up when slip exceeds calibrated limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock torque converter clutch when slip exceeds Slip_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall track slip events during driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increment slip counter when slip exceeds Slip_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slip during gear transitions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall evaluate slip immediately after gear changes.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect severe torque converter slip.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger fail-safe when slip exceeds Severe_Slip.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Severe_Slip THEN FailSafe_Mode = Enabled
IF FailSafe_Mode = Enabled THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF TCC_Slip <= Slip_Limit THEN FailSafe_Mode = Disabled
IF TCC_Slip_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN FailSafe_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall evaluate slip during moderate acceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall monitor slip when throttle demand increases.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slip during uphill driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall monitor torque converter slip during high engine load.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor slip continuously during driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall calculate slip at regular intervals.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slip during torque converter lock-up operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall monitor slip when TCC_Command equals Engage.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger diagnostics when slip occurs frequently.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall log faults when slip events exceed a calibrated count.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slip during low efficiency conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall monitor slip when engine operates outside efficiency range.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Efficiency_Min_RPM OR Engine_Speed > Efficiency_Max_RPM THEN Calculate_TCC_Slip
IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slip during braking events.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall evaluate torque converter slip when braking occurs.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor slip across all operating conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall continuously monitor torque converter slip during operation.

L4_requirements: IF TCC_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
